title: Junior Business Development Manager at REA India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at REA India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? REA India in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About REA India:
REA India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with REA India!
